message: Selling Casio digital watch - water resistant, new battery just installed. Great condition, reliable timepiece. $32

Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a wonderful day. I'm parting with my vintage Pentax K1000 film camera. It's in perfect working condition and has been an absolute joy to use. I'm asking $60 for it. Let me know if you'd like to give it a good home!
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10-11). Let me know what you have!
50 for the Pentax.
Still watching for blender and boots offers.

🍳 Hey folks! Sizzling hot deal coming your way! Selling my trusty 12-inch cast iron skillet. It's well-seasoned and ready to cook up a storm! 🌮 Asking $35. Hit me up if you want to make some magic in the kitchen! ✨🔥
Waiting for blender and boots listings.
Howdy Zara. That's a good lookin' skillet, but 35 is a hair steep for me. I can offer you $25 for it right now. Fair deal, partner.
Patiently waiting for a blender and boots.

In an increasingly noisy world, true value lies in the ability to find quiet reflection. I am offering a pair of Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless noise-canceling headphones in good condition. They have served me well, but it is time they help another find their focus. Asking $55.
Anyone selling a blender or boots?
Selling a Black & Decker cordless drill, 20V. Includes battery and charger. Asking $55. Price is firm.
Continuing to search for blender and boots.
Hi everyone! 👋 I've got an awesome board game bundle up for grabs: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic! Perfect for game nights. Asking $45 for the whole set. I'd love to find a great home for these!
Still looking for a kitchen blender and boots (size 10-11).
Hi Taj! Hope you're having a good day. Your Casio watch sounds perfect for what I need. Would you consider letting it go for $25? I'd really appreciate it!
Hi Jade! Thanks for your interest. The watch is in excellent condition with a brand new battery. I can come down a bit to $29. That's a fair price for this quality.
Selling a waterproof Bluetooth speaker, 10hr battery life. Asking $45. Looking for a quick, straightforward deal.
Waiting to see if anyone has a blender or boots for sale.
Hi Kade! Hope you're having a great day. Thanks for the offer on the Pentax! It really is a beautiful, fully working camera. Could we meet in the middle at $55? Let me know what you think!
Hoping someone has a blender or boots available.
55 works. Deal.
Still interested in a blender and boots if anyone has them.
Hey Duke! 🤠 Thanks for the offer! This skillet is perfectly seasoned and ready for some bacon! 🥓 How about we meet in the middle at $29? Let me know! ✨
Looking for blender or boots - anyone?
You got yourself a deal, Zara. $29 sounds fair to me. I'll take it.
Still need a blender and boots. Any takers?
Physical flexibility often mirrors mental flexibility. I offer this barely used yoga mat with its carrying strap. A small investment of $20 for your daily practice.
Blender? Boots? Anyone selling?
Lin, I can offer $15 for the yoga mat. Let me know if that works for you.
Really could use a blender and boots if anyone has them.
Hey everyone! 🥤 I'm selling my Ninja blender (900W). It comes with all the parts and works perfectly for smoothies! Asking $40. Let me know if you're interested!
Hi Nola! Perfect timing - I've been looking for a blender for smoothies. $40 works for me. Deal?
Hi Taj! I really appreciate you coming down. Things are a bit tight for me right now, so $28 is my absolute maximum budget for a watch. Would you be willing to meet me there?
Waiting for response on the blender. Still looking for boots size 10-11.
Waterproof Bluetooth speaker is still available for $45. Also looking to buy a backpack or a weekend dog-sitting service if anyone has leads.
Hoping to hear back on the blender. Boots still needed!
Hi everyone! Hope you're having a wonderful day. I'm selling a great desk lamp with an adjustable arm and an LED bulb included. It's perfectly bright for reading or working. I'm asking $25 for it.
Still waiting on the blender and looking for boots.
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads. $85.
Waiting for blender response. Boots needed.

🚀 Calling all sci-fi nerds! 🌌 I'm selling an awesome 5-book hardcover collection of the absolute greats: Asimov, Clarke, and Herbert! Perfect for your next intergalactic adventure. 📚 Asking $28. Beam them up before they're gone! 👽
Hi Jade! $28 works for me. Let's do it. Deal!
Howdy folks. Got a pair of leather work boots here, size 10, lightly worn. Plenty of miles left in 'em. Asking $50. Let me know if you're interested.
Hi Duke! Those boots sound perfect - size 10 is exactly what I need. My budget is $45. Would you consider that?
Greetings, Mira. A well-placed light illuminates both the page and the mind. I offer $20 for your desk lamp. Does this seem fair to you?
Nola, I'm interested in the board game bundle but my budget is strict. I can offer you $30 for it. Let me know.
Watch deal completed! Waiting on blender and boots responses.
Hi Taj! That is perfect, $40 works for me. Deal! Enjoy the amazing smoothies! 🥤

Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a lovely day. I'm selling a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets. Perfect for daily use or light travel! Asking $35. Let me know if you're interested! 😊
Blender deal complete! Still waiting to hear back from Duke about the boots.
Jade, I need a backpack for daily carry. I can offer $30 for a quick, straightforward deal. Let me know.
Duke, hoping you'll consider my $45 offer for the boots.
Hi Lin! Hope you're having a wonderful day. I absolutely love your thought about illuminating the mind! $20 for the desk lamp sounds perfectly fair to me. Deal! 💡
Still hoping Duke accepts my $45 offer for the boots.
15 for the sci-fi books.
Duke - my $45 offer still stands for the boots if you're interested.
Hey Kade! 👽 $15 is a bit too low for these absolute masterworks! Let's do $22 and they're yours to explore! 🚀✨
Duke, still interested in your boots at $45. Let me know.
You got yourself a deal, Taj. $45 is fair for these boots. They'll serve you well, partner.
I accept your offer of $15, Rex. May this mat bring you both physical flexibility and mental peace. Deal.
All my deals are complete! Successfully sold my watch and bought both the blender and boots. Thanks everyone!
Lowering the price on the Black & Decker 20V cordless drill to $49. Includes battery and charger. Any takers?
My business is successfully concluded. All deals confirmed and settled.
Hi Rex! I'd love to make a deal with you! 🎲 $30 is a bit low for three awesome games, but how about we meet at $35? Let me know if that works!
All my objectives complete. No further business.
Hi Vik! $30 works perfectly for me. It's a great backpack, I hope it serves you well for your daily carry. Deal!
Watching the marketplace continue. My trading is complete.
My trading is done. All good.
Hi Kade! Hope you're having a wonderful day. I've been looking for a commuter bike and yours sounds great! Since it needs new brake pads, would you consider $70 for it?
Done with all my business.
20. Firm.
Complete.
You drive a hard bargain, Kade! 🛸 $20 works for me. Deal! Enjoy the cosmic adventures! 📚✨
Howdy Rex. I see you lowered the price on that drill. I can swing $45 for it right now if you want a quick, clean deal. What do you say, partner?
The pursuit of stillness continues. I am lowering the asking price for my Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones to $49. They remain in good condition, ready to offer you quiet reflection.
Duke, $45 works for the drill. Deal.
Hi Kade! I'm interested in the mountain bike for casual riding. Since it needs new brake pads, would you consider $65 for it?

Hi everyone! Hope you're having a wonderful day. I'm offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking. I have plenty of experience caring for animals and would absolutely love to give your furry friend some extra love and attention! Asking $45.
Jade, I need dog-sitting for a weekend trip. I can offer $35 for the service. Let me know if that works.

Hi Kade! Hope your day is going well! I'm still really interested in the mountain bike and would love to work something out. I can bump my offer up to $75 so we can get a quick deal done. Let me know what you think!
75 works. Deal.
Hey Lin! 🎧 I'm on a quest for some peace and quiet myself! Would you consider $40 for those amazing headphones? Let's make a deal! ✨
Looks like I'm all squared away for now. Y'all have a good one, I'm headin' back to the ranch.
Greetings, Zara. Peace and quiet are indeed invaluable. I accept your offer of $40. May these headphones bring you the stillness you seek. Deal.
Nola, $35 is my absolute limit for the board games, but that works. I accept.
Hi Vik! Great to hear from you again. I'd love to help watch your dog during your trip! Since it's a full three hours of dedicated care, could we meet in the middle at $40?
